name: Women's Shiny Metal Shield Flat Top Sunglasses with Gradient Lenses - Universal Thread™ Gold: Scratch-Resistant, UV Protection
description:
Enjoy a sunny day at the beach, pool or any other spot in stunning style with the Shiny Metal Shield Flat Top Sunglasses with Gradient Lenses from Universal Thread™. These shield sunglasses feature a gold-tone metal frame with a flat top and gradient lenses for a standout look. Designed to fit extra wide faces, these gold-tone sunglasses have UV protection feature lenses to help keep your eyes shielded from harmful sun rays.

Universal Thread™: Found exclusively at Target.
